title: Try a Little Tenderness
why_this_song: Try a Little Tenderness by Otis Redding (1966) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Try a little tenderness, yeah, yeah"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Try a little tenderness, yeah, yeah"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "For things that she'll never, never, never, never possess, yeah, yeah"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Some girls they don't forget it"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Oh, she may be weary"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "little" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "little" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tenderness" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tenderness" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's not just sentimental, no, no, no
All you gotta do is, man

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And young girls they do get wearied
Love is their own happiness, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: "Try a Little Tenderness" was released in 1966. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Try a Little Tenderness" foi lançada em 1966. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Try a Little Tenderness" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Try a Little Tenderness" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
